name: Cross Creek Key Lime Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 can Eagle Brand sweetened condensed milk
1/3 cup Key Lime juice (you can buy it in a bottle)
1/2 teaspoon Cream whipped with 2 tablespoons confectioner's sugar and 1 zest of 6 Key Limes (grated peel)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the sweetened condensed milk, lime juice, egg yolks, rum, graham cracker crumbs, cream mixture, orange bitters, and additional rum until well combined.
2. Pour the mixture into a 9-inch pie dish lined with a graham cracker crust.
3. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours to set.
4. Before serving, top with additional lime zest if desired.
5. Turn off heat sources and serve chilled.
